Bash(cat > ~/.config/systemd/user/recall.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Claude Recall daemon
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/home/timothy/.local/bin/recall start --foreground
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
Environment=HOME=/home/timothy

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF
echo "Service file created")

Bash(cat > ~/.config/systemd/user/recall.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Claude Recall daemon
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/home/timothy/.hermes/node/bin/node /home/timothy/.local/lib/node_modules/@clauderecallhq/cli/dist/daemon/entrypoint.js
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
Environment=HOME=/home/timothy
Environment=RECALL_HOME=/home/timothy/.recall

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
EOF

systemctl --user daemon-reload
systemctl --user enable recall.service
echo "Service enabled")

Bash(node .qoder/skills/run-all/driver.mjs --cms --timeout 120000 > /tmp/cms-test.log 2>&1 &
CMS_PID=$!
echo "Driver PID: $CMS_PID"
# Wait up to 150 seconds for it to finish \(it should exit after checks\)
for i in $\(seq 1 30\); do
  sleep 5
  if ! kill -0 $CMS_PID 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Driver exited after ~$\(\(i*5\)\)s"
    break
  fi
  # Check if we see the summary line
  if grep -q "SUMMARY" /tmp/cms-test.log 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Summary found after ~$\(\(i*5\)\)s"
    kill $CMS_PID 2>/dev/null
    break
  fi
  echo "Still running at $\(\(i*5\)\)s..."
done
echo "--- OUTPUT ---"
cat /tmp/cms-test.log | grep -v '^\\[cms\\]' | tail -30
echo "--- CMS LINES \(filtered\) ---"
grep '\\[cms\\]' /tmp/cms-test.log | grep -i 'error\\|ready\\|compiled' | tail -5)
Bash(pkill -f "payload" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "next-server" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; lsof -i :3003 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "CMS port 3003 freed")
Bash(lsof -i :3000 -i :3001 -i :3002 -i :3003 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "All ports 3000-3003 free")
